creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223412
py-numpy 1.19.4 v4

- update numpy to 1.19.4
- While here replace `${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}numpy.*:math/py-numpy@${PY_FLAVOR}` by `${PYNUMPY}`
- replace `USES=python:3.[4-5]` by `USES=python:3.6`
- bump portrevision
- replace range version in `Mk/Uses/python.mk` (workaround for https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/pull/1944)
